name: SA SMS reply-bait - stage-one smishing with no entities
evidence: Your CV has been shortlisted for an admin position at a top retailer, R8500 per month. Reply YES to secure your interview slot.
missing_evidence: No company domain or recruiter email
No link — the reply itself is the hook
recommended_action: Do not reply (even YES/STOP confirms a live number); report and block the sender
